- should an empty line pass as an error (SOLVED: explanation bellow)
	- test case:
	{

	ft_irc 451 x\r\nNICK :You have not registered

	ft_irc 451 x\r\nNICK :You have not registered
			
	ft_irc 451 x\r\nNICK :You have not registered
	}
	same as this:
	{
		\r\n
		ft_irc 451 x\r\nNICK \R\N :You have not registered
	}
	SOLVED explanation:
	[If you really want to test the literal \r\n bytes, you need a raw tool like netcat (nc) or a script,
	 not telnet, because telnet interprets input as text lines.]
